notices.author: PaperStream Admin
notices.message:
This is to inform all students that the **Exam Form Portal** is now open for the **2nd Semester** examinations.

### Important Instructions:
- All students are required to fill their **2nd Semester Exam Form** online.
- The fee for the 2nd Semester Exam Form is **₹560**.
- Students having **back** in any subject of the **1st Semester** can also fill the back form through the same portal. The portal will automatically show the required fee amount for back papers.
- Students are advised to **submit their exam forms as soon as possible** to avoid last-minute issues.

### Document Required:
- **ABC ID** (Aadhaar-linked Academic Bank of Credits ID)

For any queries, please contact Or tell us in app Chat section
notices.title: Submission of 2nd Semester Exam Forms**
